privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Blender 4.2.4 scene with a subdivided cube mesh (MorphCube, 2 units, subdivision level 3) and requires morphing animation using exactly 3 shape keys (Basis + Spherical + Stretched). The output file is saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/morph_animation.blend with animation keyframes at frames 1, 30, and 60, and timeline set to range [1, 60]. The scene includes a camera, sun light, ground plane, and material. Vertex displacements must exceed 0.1 average per shape key with >10 nonzero vertices. The environment is blender3d_env@0.1 using Blender 4.2.4 LTS with CYCLES rendering engine at 1920x1080 resolution (50% preview).
